VeBetterDAO dApp listings are 100% commu: VeBetterDAO dApp listings are 100% community-driven. As a valued member of the VeBetterDAO ecosystem, we encourage every eligible community member to carefully evaluate each dApp before using their endorsement points. Use your endorsement power responsibly to support dApps that can drive the long-term growth and sustainability of our ecosystem. Stay alert and be cautious of potential scams. The rewards pool holds B3TR used to rewa: The rewards pool holds B3TR used to reward user actions. When you enable it, <bold>the pool starts empty</bold>, remember to <bold>fill it with funds</bold> to distribute rewards.
When you disabled rewards pool, <bold>th: When you disabled rewards pool, <bold>the funds will move to app balance</bold>, you can enable it back at any time. The distributor will <bold>stop distributing rewards</bold> from the app balance pool.
<bold>Resume the distribution</bold> to: <bold>Resume the distribution</bold> to distribute rewards again and set a rewards pool.
You can pause your app distribution. Thi: You can pause your app distribution. This will <bold>stop your distributor from distributing rewards</bold>. You can resume the distribution at any time. This action won't affect your app's pools.

When you enable the rewards pool, it sta: When you enable the rewards pool, it starts empty. You'll need to transfer B3TR to it before you can distribute rewards.
This will automatically move your reward: This will automatically move your rewards pool to your app balance. You can enable back the rewards pool at any time.
This will temporarily stop rewards distr: This will temporarily stop rewards distribution for your app until you resume it.
Your distributor will have access back t: Your distributor will have access back to the rewards pool if you enabled it, and users will start receiving rewards for their actions again.
Transfer B3TR between your App Balance P: Transfer B3TR between your App Balance Pool and the Rewards Pool. Refill B3TR to the Rewards Pool to distribute rewards, or move them back to the app balance when needed.
Refill B3TR to the Rewards Pool to distr: Refill B3TR to the Rewards Pool to distribute rewards, or move them back to the app balance when needed.

Only app admin can transfer and manage t: Only app admin can transfer and manage the rewards pool

Mint your free GM Earth NFT after voting: Mint your free GM Earth NFT after voting.
A GM Earth NFT is your entry pass into D: A GM Earth NFT is your entry pass into DAO governance and rewards. It gives you access to extra features, and you can later upgrade it to boost your rewards with multipliers.
Once minted, you can keep it as-is or up: Once minted, you can keep it as-is or upgrade it (paid) to unlock other DAO features.
A VeChain Node gives you rewards, voting: A VeChain Node gives you rewards, voting power in the DAO, and the ability to endorse apps.
By attaching your GM NFT to a node, you: By attaching your GM NFT to a node, you can boost rewards, upgrade your NFT, and gain more influence in governance. Endorsing apps is vital for the DAO, and many apps offer perks to their endorsers. Node holders with NFTs above Flesh level also get free GM upgrades.

To move forward, reach at least 3.5M VOT: To move forward, reach at least 3.5M VOT3 in deposits within 1 week from the community. Otherwise, the grant will be cancelled automatically.

Assets should not contain logos, brands,: Assets should not contain logos, brands, text, or any unrelated objects/elements to the app's purpose.
X2Earn is VeBetterDAO’s framework for ap: X2Earn is VeBetterDAO’s framework for apps that reward sustainable actions with B3TR. The “X” can be any activity (e.g., Plant-2-Earn, Sweat-2-Earn).
